consumerTone: plain English; educational detox-pathway boundary context only; no detoxification capacity, toxin sensitivity, diagnosis, diet, supplement, medication, or treatment claims

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived MTHFR calls for detox-pathway validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable detox pathway, toxin sensitivity, methylation score, homocysteine, labs, diet history, supplement context, medication context, broader Detox Pathway gene model, recommendation personalization model, and treatment context explicitly; do not infer detox status or action. Use sample SNP tables, lab chips, recommendations, and glossary only as observed output-format examples.

referenceResources.title: CDC MTHFR Gene Variant and Folic Acid Facts

reportPurpose: Consumer detox-pathway boundary context using derived MTHFR calls, CDC folic-acid safety framing, and observed Detox Pathway sample-report output structure.
